sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: O Lord, I trust in your merciful love. My heat will rejoice in your salvation. I will sing to the Lord who has been bountiful with me.

sections.author: Spirit & Psalm
sections.snippet: The Lord is kind and merciful.

sections.author: Spirit & Psalm
sections.snippet: I give you a new commandment, says the Lord: love one another as I have loved you.

sections.title: Love Goes On
sections.author: Bernadette Farrell
sections.snippet: Love is patient, love is kind, never ending, never ending; slow to anger, rich in mercy, love goes on beyond all time.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Lord, I have come to believe that you are the Christ, the Son of the living God, who is coming into this world.

sections.title: Ubi Caritas
sections.author: Bob Hurd
sections.snippet: Ubi caritas est vera, est vera: Deus ibi est, Deus ibi est.

sections.title: Psalm 103: The Lord Is Kind and Merciful
sections.author: Ricky Manalo CSP
sections.snippet: The Lord is kind and merciful; merciful is the Lord.

sections.title: Can We Love
sections.author: Tom Booth
sections.snippet: Can we love? Can we lay down our lives? Can we wear his crown of thorns? Can we drink the cup that he drinks? We must lay down our lives!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
